channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 ConardLi/garden-skills (5401 ⭐)
item.description:

item.title: 📝 ab-613/OpenGravity (200 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ab-613

📝 Repository: ab-613/OpenGravity

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight, vanilla JS, open source BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) clone of the Google Antigravity UI. It currently features a live xterm.js terminal with direct local file system sync and a sidebar agent capable of running commands and editing files. Built in pure HTML/CSS/JS for maximum speed and zero installation.

⭐ Stelle: 200

🍴 Forks: 15

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-11T11:51:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-22T05:35:28Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
